tailoring_notes: JD term 'playbook' woven into microsoft_ft bullet 1 ('standardizing playbooks') and pro_painters bullet 1 ('first repeatable, data-driven outreach playbook') — mirrors JD's 'design a playbook from scratch' language.

JD term 'data signals to prioritize work across a large creator cohort' reflected in microsoft_2022 bullet 3 ('data signals needed to prioritize high-impact automation gaps') and pro_painters bullet 2 ('using engagement data signals to prioritize').

JD phrase 'repeatable processes' and '0→1 building' surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet 2 ('repeatable, scalable model'), amazon_robotics bullet 1 ('scaled program with clear sequencing'), and title-level framing in microsoft_ft swap to Program Manager.
